feed.title: Vantage AI
feed.subtitle: AI job preparation. Upload your CV, paste a job link, get the full prep pack in ~90 seconds.

entry.title: Just laid off in April 2026? The 3 things to fix in your CV before you apply to a single job.
entry.summary: ~42,000 tech employees were laid off in April 2026 alone. If you're one of them, this is the foundation work to do before you start applying. ATS parser checks, formatting strip-down, exact-match keyword tuning.

entry.title: Oracle, Meta, ASML, Snap, Nike: a layoff-week CV checklist
entry.summary: A specific 5-step checklist for tech employees laid off in April/May 2026. CV format, ATS parse, recruiter outreach, interview prep, and the LinkedIn moves to make in week one.

entry.title: Tailoring every resume vs the smarter alternative
entry.summary: Why fully tailoring every resume might be costing you interviews — and the smarter system used by people who apply at scale.

entry.title: 500 applications, zero interviews: the ATS parse problem nobody talks about
entry.summary: Why hundreds of applications can return zero replies — and a 60-second test that diagnoses it.

entry.title: How to spot a ghost job in 30 seconds
entry.summary: Half the postings out there are not real jobs. Here's the 30-second check that decides if you should apply — or skip and save the hour.
